hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
if 'good morning' in data.get('prompt', '').lower():
    with open('/Users/Ignacio/Desktop/Workspace/ig-arcana-simple/CONTEXT.md') as f:
        content = f.read()
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'UserPromptSubmit', 'additionalContext': 'CONTEXT.md (daily briefing):\n' + content}}))
" 2>/dev/null || true
